title: February 4th, 2022
body:
lyrics

the oddest part is we saw them tortured artists
but never seemed to wonder who the torturer's are
it's bizarre the ease with which we believe the idea
that they do it to themselves cuz that's just who they are
the world's a stage and you can't separate the person from the part
so you trap em on the page before the play start
then measure the words they say by how they line up
if you can't do the crime we don't count the time
no one gets paid if they stay behind us
it's a good day to die or a data mine
shoulda read the fine print before ya signed up
blood in blood out that's the basic idea
but now we need whole bodies to grind up

i'm talkin

lyrics

i'm talkin way way
the tao of now
aka
how the prow plows
ligh it's a particle and wave

see a seat and i sit in it to see if it fits
see i'm indigenous to my experience
so that's how i live
look around like are you hearin this
i got evidence

i'm indigenous to my experience***

othering is a euphemism for genocide

the act of marginalization is the act of pushing another closer to death in the hopes of avoiding it oneself
